title: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]"ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!"[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]35[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]35[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!

conditions: At least 105 Gold required for all players
notes:
[gold]Endless Feast - A Repeating Event[/gold]

This event allows you to continuously grab dishes off a conveyor belt. Each grab costs 35 Gold (except [blue]Golden Fysh[/blue] which grants 75 Gold with no cost).

[gold]Dish Selection:[/gold]
Dishes are selected randomly using weighted selection:
• Caviar: weight 6
• Clam Roll: weight 6 (only available if not at full health)
• Spicy Snappy: weight 3
• Jelly Liver: weight 3
• Fried Eel: weight 3
• Suspicious Condiment: weight 3 (only available if open potion slots exist)
• Golden Fysh: weight 1 (only available after you've made at least 2 grabs)

[gold]Special Mechanics:[/gold]
• Every 5th grab (grabs 5, 10, 15, etc.), [gold]Seapunk Salad[/gold] is guaranteed as the next option
• The dish you just grabbed is excluded from the next selection pool to prevent consecutive repeats
• If you run out of Gold (less than 35), the grab option becomes locked with the message "Broke: You could eat more but you are out of Gold"
• Alternatively, at the start of the event, you can "Observe the Chef" to upgrade a random card in your deck and end the event immediately
• After your first grab, you can choose to "Leave" the event at any time
